release_notes:
File Comparison output redesign:
- lines_<sheet> tab per common sheet, IDENTICAL or not
- Each row marked MATCH / DIFF / ONLY in A / ONLY in B
- PER-SHEET ROW IDENTITY block in 00_Verdict_Summary
- Identical / Differing / Only A / Only B columns in 01_Sheet_Map
- Frozen header + AutoFilter on every breakdown tab
314 tests + 4 skipped.
